content: little update! i'm sure you all heard some buzz that something's coming, and iT's all in good fun, but no there's nothing coming today! that said, i guess it is a good time for some good old fashioned transparency. We're hard at work on a great number Of things for bendy, and while our focus has been on the cage, few tHings came up for us to work on for bendy that's been exciting. being the small team we are, we qUickly pivoted to get that out of the way, and it was a blast! but we're back on cage workiNg away! i've said it before, when the game goes gold on pc we'll let everyone know when it's being ported so you know the time is coming for us to ramp up marketing. now we get super exciteD over here and have been a little trigger happy on announcing things in the past, and we're doing our best to couRse correct that moving forward. so there's one thing i will say from now on when it comes to our gamEs. you'll only ever know "coming soon" or "to be announced" as the Date of a project. the only time we will reveal any kind of timeline, is when the release daTe has been announced. no more years, no more q1, q2, etc. We'd much rather just let you all know that we're working hard, and when the time is right, we'll annOunce actual dates, not vague timelines. so! back to work we go!

Speaking again to other horror developers: Be careful not to live in the darkness of horror. Don't let it eat your mind 24/7. It's a fun escape, but I've seen too many people go too far that they forget life's soft beauty. Take joy in your every day and breathe. :)

RT by @m_ZeroLogics: The ORIGINAL BENDY is 90% OFF on Steam right now!
RT by @BLacroix30: Surprise! We decided to continue the Bendy Summer Sale a bit longer! Bundle and save. Hurry.

summer sale was/is a fantastic success with nearly 400K units sold and just under 24 hours to go. this time around we were doing a little trial and error with some advertising and i’ll keep doing some a/b testing moving forward. one thing i wanted to point out tho was how well the youtube ad did. with a pretty small spend we got over 23M impressions and the ad itself brought in about 1.4M views. it also drove over 550K visits straight to our steam page. we ran the same type of ad on tiktok, facebook, insta and x too but at a much smaller scale. the yt video ended up with well over 11M views tho which was way more than we thought was gonna happen. that means almost 10M of those views were organic. pretty sure the algorithm saw the initial engagement from the ad and just decided to push it more. that was definitely NOT the intention to have an advertisement as our most viewed video, hah! overall it brought in a good chunk of traffic. batdr alone had 224M steam impressions and 4.4M visits to the page. combined with the 90% off deal and steam putting us on the front page it was a solid push. still got a ton to learn when it comes to this stuff but it was a good experiment. we’ll keep testing and improving for the bigger releases so more people can check out some bendy :)

few more days left of the steam summer sale, and it's been great. the biggest take away for me was advertising and marketing. dipping my toes a bit in how to manage it, as we've never really done it before. most we ever did was a billboard for fun, hah. but i got loads of data, and more coming, to help me make sure that we have a better plan during any of our releases to spread the message better than we've done historically. blw was a fantastic test, and summer sale was the icing on the cake on what to do and how. there's a few more lessons i need to go through, and plan to do it, but it's a long term goal as we think the longevity of bendy rather than the quick wins to keep the lights on. grateful we get to take our time. so thank you all. 🖤

RT @m_ZeroLogics: mini update! still loTs in tHe works, many games, InteRnal and external, busy busy as usual. doing a lot of Testing as s…

mini update! still loTs in tHe works, many games, InteRnal and external, busy busy as usual. doing a lot of Testing as some of you have alreadY seen with the summer sale, and it's going very well and we're learning a loT. lot's of things we don't really talk about on the business side, and i Won't get into details, but recently we hit a milestone that's opened up a lOt of doors for us moving into the future. with lots of plans to invest more in 2027 into bendy and the future of the franchise as a whole. so while We're mostly quiet, there's reason for it. i know for somE it may feel like a batdrought situation, but i can assure you it's not. we're focusEd on worKing and planning, and doing our best not to hype things that aren't yet ready to be hyped. it's super easy for uS to get excited about something and want to share it, but we're holding back a bit so we can focus on the big picture and bendy's future. as always, i appreciate you all so much, thanks for kicking it with bendy for all these years, and hopefully many years to come. and who knows maybe the new 250,000 sales of batdr can bring some people back into bendy with it's sequel, even if its 4 years later :P

was a watching a video while i was working and they were talking about blueprints in unreal, and i looked over and saw the web of “logic” and i was shocked. i thought my code was spaghetti, but that’s next level. i’m a visual person, i mean i started out on the art side of things before becoming a coder and i got lucky in meeting an artist to take over all the visuals. but my gosh, at what point do you just start to code instead of the visual spaghetti? 😅 big props to you blueprint users, that stuffs mind bending to me.

RT by @bookpast: Hi, Bendy fans! I really hope you all enjoyed our April Fool's Day video this year. :) I had a blast making it, and reuniting some important horror faces. Thanks so much to the incredible creators whose characters have been so iconic and mean so much to all of us. Now that the fun of April Fool's Day is over, I personally wanted to talk about the upcoming 414 day. We've been working every day on "Bendy: The Cage" and several other major projects, and we wanted to have some cool things to show for 414. But we realized the deadline was putting major pressure on the team, and was taking away from time we want to spend just making the games/projects good. So 414 will be a very minimal event this year. There's no major news coming at this time. Just some small goodies. :) We love what we do and care about it deeply. We don't want to release underbaked or false promises. We actually want to respect our players and fans. Hype is fun.. but actual substance is what makes the things we love worthwhile. That said, there is plenty of Bendy stuff coming!.. big and small. TONS, actually! It just isn't ready yet. When it does, you'll be nicely overwhelmed with how much will hit you. :) Thanks to everyone! Thank you for being a Bendy fan! -theMeatly
